title: senecio viridilacus
intro: Senecio viridilacus is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as Jacob's Ladder or Green Senecio, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio viridilacus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Senecio viridilacus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
